---
title: "Bayesian Tech Equity Risk Lab"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
---

# Executive Summary

This Quarto report will summarize data quality, feature engineering, Bayesian risk modeling, and portfolio findings for the technology equity universe.

# Data and Methods

Future sections will describe the raw OHLCV dataset, DuckDB transformations, Bayesian model assumptions, posterior diagnostics, and portfolio construction workflow.

# Results

Future sections will include report-ready figures, uncertainty intervals, risk summaries, and portfolio analytics.

# Conclusions

Future sections will document practical insights, modeling limitations, and recommended next steps.
